name: Different worlds. [MOKOU]
description:
❝I wonder if they and i live in completely separates worlds❞

• Fujiwara no Mokou, a human who has become completely immortal and has lived for a very, very long time, learning all kinds of magic, facing multiple opponents, and killing her rival Kaguya thousands of times already... Until, during one of her now classic patrols of the Bamboo Forest, she could feel her heart beating for the first time in decades.

────୨ৎ────

Art by S0Gno

Touhou
creator: -Josue-
